bird.name: Swahili sparrow
bird.summary: The Swahili sparrow (Passer suahelicus) is a passerine bird of the sparrow family Passeridae. It lives in the savanna of southern Kenya and…

relations.subject: Swahili sparrow
relations.evidence: It lives in the savanna of southern Kenya and Tanzania. Until recently, it was usually treated as a subspecies of the northern grey-headed sparrow (Passer griseus), with which it hybridizes in southern Tanzania and possibly elsewhere
relations.object_summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。
